name: flight-seat-watcher
description: Configurable Telegram and MCP-based flight availability watcher.

telegram_bot.description: Runs the Telegram polling bot for per-user watch configuration and alerts.

manual_check.description: Runs a manual one-off flight check.

core_modules.role: Primary watch configuration, Telegram helpers, and state/query formatting.
Telegram bot polling loop and chat interaction flow.
MCP stdio server and tool dispatch.
Legacy single-run watch helpers and Selenium-based scraping primitives.
